positive: A whimsical illustration of a grumpy badger wearing a tiny wizard's hat, sitting next to a stack of glowing, magical books. Storybook style, soft watercolor textures, pastel tones with pops of bright yellow and teal. Character illustration, friendly, highly detailed.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, scary, hyperrealistic, oil painting
